claim_boundary: Prefix-probe partial improvement only; it does not beat D2E paper/repo G-IDM targets and does not complete G005.
diagnosis: Joint event-head plus button-token-confidence calibration reduced target no-button FPR versus event-only dynamic calibration, but the target FPR remains far above the <=0.10 gate.
The branch recovered one exact button true-positive example and nonzero strict button F1, but precision/recall remain too low for G005 promotion.

The result supports the abstention-guard direction inside the FDM-1-shaped masked action-token recipe, but still needs stronger split-robust calibration and/or better video/action-token representation before scaling.
next_branch_requirements: Keep the public FDM-1 recipe shape: video-token encoder plus non-causal masked-diffusion IDM over action tokens.
Tighten target-transfer without using target labels: e.g. fold/recording-robust calibration, event-rate priors from train labels, or confidence-budgeted iterative unmasking.
Do not launch full-corpus 4xH200 G005 until a bounded prefix probe demonstrates target no-button FPR near <=0.10 with nonzero button recall and stronger keyboard/mouse metrics.
recipe_alignment: public FDM-1-shaped noncausal masked-diffusion IDM with typed masked action-token planes for mouse/key/button factors.
